local_dishes.name: Poisson Cru au lait de coco
local_dishes.description: Raw fish marinated in coconut milk and lime. It's similar to ceviche but with a creamy twist from the coconut milk
source_files: French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf

local_dishes.name: Poulet fafa
local_dishes.description: Chicken cooked with taro leaves and coconut milk. Often prepared in a traditional underground oven called an ahima'a, giving it a smoky and earthy flavor
source_files: French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf

local_dishes.name: Po'e
local_dishes.description: A sweet and starchy pudding made from taro, banana, or pumpkin. It's cooked in an ahima'a and served with coconut cream
source_files: French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf

local_dishes.name: Fafaru
local_dishes.description: Fish marinated in fermented seawater with crushed shrimp. It has a strong aroma and flavor that's an acquired taste
source_files: French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf

local_dishes.name: Pahua Taioro
local_dishes.description: Exquisite Tahitian dish based on clams (pahua) soaked in fresh water for a few hours before being combined with taioro, a condiment made by fermenting almonds, grated coconut, seawater, and shrimps
source_files: French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf

local_dishes.name: Firi Firi
local_dishes.description: Tahitian doughnuts made with flour, coconut milk, and sugar, then deep-fried until golden brown. Often served with fruit or jam
source_files: French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf

local_dishes.name: Chevrettes
local_dishes.description: Freshwater prawns that are a local delicacy. Often grilled or cooked in a flavorful sauce. Consists of peeled and deveined shrimps, oil, sliced Tahitian vanilla beans, coconut milk, rum, cream, salt, and black pepper
source_files: French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf

local_dishes.name: Breadfruit
local_dishes.description: Versatile fruit that is a staple in Polynesian cuisine. Can be roasted, boiled, or fried and has a starchy texture and mild flavor
source_files: French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf

local_dishes.name: Coconut Crab
local_dishes.description: Large land crab that is a prized ingredient. Known for its rich and flavorful meat
source_files: French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf

local_dishes.name: Taro
local_dishes.description: Root vegetable that is a staple in Polynesian cuisine. Can be cooked in various ways, including boiled, mashed, or baked
source_files: French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf

emergency_contacts._source_file: French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf
French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: There are 2 main providers- Vini and Vodafone. Vini sim is recommended as they have the best 4G/5G mobile data network across all the islands
connectivity_tips._source_file: French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: Best place to buy a prepaid sim card is in the airport on arrival. At the Relay store, you will find the Vini sim cards and there is also a Vodafone store
connectivity_tips._source_file: French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: You can also purchase an e-sim like Holafly or Airalo if you want international roaming but without a physical sim
connectivity_tips._source_file: French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: The Airport in Papeete does not offer free WiFi
connectivity_tips._source_file: French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf

source_files: French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf
